personas: Primary User: Tech-savvy individual seeking efficient and intuitive digital solutions
Secondary User: Novice user looking for straightforward navigation and clear guidance
key_flows: User onboarding including account creation and profile setup
Core functionality usage from homepage to final goal completion
Feedback submission and support request handling
friction_points: Unclear labeling leading to navigation confusion
Overwhelming information on initial screens causing decision paralysis
Inconsistent interaction patterns causing user hesitation

information_architecture.hierarchy: Content is organized from general to specific, starting with broad categories on the homepage leading to detailed subpages and functional areas, ensuring a clear path to key actions.
navigation: Top-level navigation bar with primary sections
Contextual side navigation for subcategory exploration
Footer with supplemental links and contact information
categorization: Main categories based on user goals and content types
Secondary categories to segment related functionalities and information
Tagging system for cross-category content discovery

layout_structure.type: Two-column layout with a fixed header
components: Header with logo and main menu
Main content area for primary interactions
Footer with legal and support links

responsive.mobile: Single-column stacked layout with collapsible menu and bottom navigation for key actions
responsive.tablet: Two-column layout with collapsible sidebar and visible header navigation
responsive.desktop: Full two-column layout with persistent sidebar and header navigation

design_system.typography: Primary font: Sans-serif (e.g., Open Sans), Sizes ranging from 12pt (small text) to 24pt (headings), with clear hierarchy and consistent line spacing
design_system.colors: Primary palette includes a dominant brand color, secondary complementary colors, neutral greys for backgrounds and text, and accent colors for interactive elements ensuring visual clarity and brand consistency
design_system.spacing: 8px base spacing unit with multiples used for margins and paddings to maintain rhythm and consistency across components
components: Buttons with primary, secondary, and disabled states
Form inputs including text fields, dropdowns, checkboxes, and radio buttons
Cards for content grouping with shadow and border radius
Navigation elements including menus, tabs, and breadcrumbs

accessibility.keyboard_nav: All interactive elements are reachable and operable via keyboard with visible focus indicators and logical tab order
accessibility.screen_reader: Semantic HTML elements used, ARIA roles and labels applied where necessary to ensure screen reader users receive meaningful and contextual information
accessibility.contrast_ratio: Minimum 4.5:1 for text and interactive elements against their backgrounds to ensure readability

interactions.animations: Subtle transitions on hover and focus states (e.g., color fades over 150ms), smooth modal opening and closing animations, and feedback animations on form submission
interactions.loading_state: Display a centered spinner or skeleton UI to indicate content is loading without blocking user interaction unnecessarily
interactions.empty_state: Informative messages with illustrative icons guiding users on next steps or actions to take when no content is available
